query: SELECT r.applicationId, a.applicationNumber, a.status FROM risk_questionnaires r LEFT JOIN applications a ON r.applicationId = a.id WHERE r.totalScore IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.applicationId DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2uixhWXF4JwUSvL.6b97ca2f8816 --database gu8TL5Ga5RUHfjV8rgaSaT --execute SELECT r.applicationId, a.applicationNumber, a.status FROM risk_questionnaires r LEFT JOIN applications a ON r.applicationId = a.id WHERE r.totalScore IS NOT NULL ORDER BY r.applicationId DESC;
